---
# ── PORTFOLIO SOLUTION ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy into src/content/portfolio/your-solution-slug.mdx and fill in.
# The file NAME becomes the URL: .../discount-app.mdx → /portfolio/discount-app
# Only `title` and `summary` are required — delete any field you don't need;
# action buttons appear ONLY for the links you provide.

title: '' # ← solution name                          (REQUIRED)
summary: '' # ← one line for the card                  (REQUIRED, < 200)
# tagline: ''                # ← OPTIONAL longer line on the detail page hero
status: shipped # ← shipped | in-progress | concept (or delete for none)
tech: [Flow, LWC] # ← tech badges (optional)

# Action links — each button shows ONLY if you fill its URL. Delete the rest.
# useUrl: https://…          # ← ▶ try it live (demo / app / AppExchange)
# validateUrl: https://…     # ← ✓ verify it yourself (test org / steps)
# repoUrl: https://…         # ← 👁 source code
# blogSlug: my-post-slug     # ← 📝 link to a related blog post (its file name)

# Detail-page sidecard (all optional)
# role: Builder
# completedAt: 2026-01-01

order: 100 # ← lower number sorts earlier on /portfolio
featured: false # ← true = show on the homepage "Featured work" strip
published: true # ← false = private
# image: /images/my-shot.png # ← OPTIONAL thumbnail; falls back to initials
---

## The problem

What needed solving. (The detail page can be short — fill what's useful.)

## What I built

- Key piece one
- Key piece two

## How it works

Optional detail / code / screenshots.

## Try it yourself

If there's a demo or test org, tell people how to use and validate it.
